start.speaker: Discretion
start.text: Before you are welcomed in, tell me truly: do you come trusting your own goodness, or the mercy that pardoned you at the Cross?
start.text_zh: 在你被迎进来之前，请如实告诉我：你来，是倚靠自己的良善，还是倚靠那在十字架前赦免你的怜悯？

choices.text: Only the mercy. My burden fell there, not by my strength.
choices.text_zh: 唯靠那怜悯。我的重担在那里落下，并非靠我的力量。

choices.text: I have tried hard to be worthy of this place.
choices.text_zh: 我已尽力，想配得上这地方。

gentle.speaker: Discretion
gentle.text: Worth did not bring you up the hill — grace did. Rest in that, and you will rest indeed.
gentle.text_zh: 把你带上山的不是配得，是恩典。安息于此，你才真得安息。

choices.text: You are right. I will rest in grace.
choices.text_zh: 你说得对。我要安息在恩典里。

welcome.speaker: Discretion
welcome.text: Then you are welcome here. Come in, and let my sisters search and strengthen your heart.
welcome.text_zh: 那么，欢迎你。进来吧，让我的姊妹们察验、坚固你的心。
